ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the athlete */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the athlete */,
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discipline the athlete competes in */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the athlete */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the athlete */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete's coach */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the athlete record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the athlete record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_discipline_id FOREIGN KEY ("discipline_id") REFERENCES disciplines ("discipline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disciplines" (
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discipline */,
  "discipline_name" TEXT /* Name of the discipline */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the discipline */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age required for athletes in the discipline */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age required for athletes in the discipline */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the discipline record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the discipline record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discipline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., Qualifying, Finals) */,
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discipline the event belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_discipline_id FOREIGN KEY ("discipline_id") REFERENCES disciplines ("discipline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "technical_difficulty" REAL /* Technical difficulty score achieved by the athlete */,
  "execution_score" REAL /* Execution score achieved by the athlete */,
  "deductions" REAL /* Deductions applied to the athlete's score */,
  "total_score" REAL /* Total score (sum of technical and artistic scores) */,
  "place" INTEGER /* Place achieved by the athlete */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judges" (
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each judge */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the judge */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the judge */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the judge */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification level of the judge */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the judge record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the judge record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge */,
  "technical_score" REAL /* Technical score given by the judge */,
  "artistic_score" REAL /* Artistic score given by the judge */,
  "deduction" REAL /* Deduction given by the judge */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discipline */,
  "ranking_date" TEXT /* Date of the ranking */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking of the athlete */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for the ranking */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ranking record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ranking record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_discipline_id FOREIGN KEY ("discipline_id") REFERENCES disciplines ("discipline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)
